title: CHRISTIAN ADULT DAY CARE - 211info
text: GENTOG ADULT DAY SERVICES CHRISTIAN ADULT DAY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an adult day care program including social activities, meals, physical exercise, mental exercise, music, and assistance with activities of daily living (ADL). 11535 SW Durham Road Suite C5 Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Medicaid: Age 55 and older Private pay: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, Saturday 10am-3pm Prepaid 3 hour sessions: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1-4pm Email (503) 639-2600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 639-2600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: $40 per hour, $150 per day, or monthly rates available for regular attendees. Cash, check, Automated Clearing House (ACH), Visa, MasterCard, and Discover cards are accepted. Prepaid 3 hour sessions: $90 per session. DOCUMENTS: Online enrollment form, medication list if applicable, Portable (or Physician) Orders for Life-Sustaining Treatment (POLST) if applicable, and/or Advanced Directive form if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off 99W and SW Durham Road in the Willowbrook Center near King City. On TriMet bus line 12. Services: Adult Day Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: MUTUAL SUPPORT - CAREGIVER SUPPORT GROUP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GENTOG ADULT DAY SERVICES
